title: ServiceNow Support Consultant - Ostrava
description_html:
Devoteam is an AI-driven tech consulting firm specialising in cloud platforms, cybersecurity, data, and sustainability.

Tech native for over 30 years, Devoteam guides businesses through sustainable digital transformation to deliver value.

With over 11,000 tech architects in more than 25 countries across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, Devoteam is committed to using technology to serve people.

Devoteam has been a ServiceNow Elite Partner since 2019, and recipient of the 2025 Partner of the Year award.

Job Description

We are seeking a proactive and skilled ServiceNow Support Consultant to join our growing team. This role is crucial for ensuring the smooth operation and optimal performance of our clients' ServiceNow instances. You will be the primary point of contact for resolving incidents, fulfilling service requests, and providing expert guidance to users, helping them maximize their investment in the ServiceNow platform.

The ideal candidate possesses a strong technical background in ServiceNow, excellent problem-solving abilities, and a commitment to delivering outstanding customer service.

Key Responsibilities:

Incident Resolution & Troubleshooting:

  • Serve as the primary point of contact for users reporting issues or requesting support related to ServiceNow applications (e.g., ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, GRC).
  • Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve complex ServiceNow incidents, providing timely and effective solutions.


Service Request Fulfillment:

  • Process and fulfill service requests within the ServiceNow platform, such as user provisioning, access management, data modifications, and minor configuration changes.
  • Ensure adherence to established service level agreements (SLAs) for all incidents and service requests.


User Support & Guidance:

  • Provide expert guidance and best practices to ServiceNow users, helping them navigate the platform and utilize its features effectively.


Configuration & Maintenance:

  • Perform routine system health checks, monitoring, and maintenance activities to ensure platform stability and performance.


Collaboration & Communication:

  • Collaborate closely with internal development teams, project managers, and other support staff to ensure seamless service delivery.


Documentation & Reporting:

  • Maintain accurate and detailed records of all support activities, resolutions, and configurations within the ticketing system.
  • Generate reports on common issues, performance trends, and service delivery metrics.


Qualifications

Requirements:

Must have:

  • Minimum 1 year of professional experience in an IT Support, Technical Support, or Application Support role, with a strong focus on ServiceNow or similar tools.
  • Proven experience in troubleshooting and resolving issues within the ServiceNow platform.
  • Solid understanding of the ServiceNow platform and its core functionalities.
  • Basic knowledge of JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and GlideScript.
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with a methodical approach to troubleshooting.
  • Strong communication skills (written and verbal) in English, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical users.
  • German language on basic communication level.
  • Strong customer service orientation and a commitment to user satisfaction.
  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • A proactive attitude and a willingness to continuously learn and adapt to new technologies.
  • Team player with strong interpersonal skills.


We prefer:

  • ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA) is a big plus.
  • Additional ServiceNow certifications (e.g., CIS-ITSM, CIS-HRSD) are a significant advantage.


Additional Information

Benefits:

  • 5 weeks of vacation per year (= 1 week extra)
  • 4 “My Days” per year
  • Hybrid office
  • Flexible working hours
  • Udemy for business account
  • Meal allowance up to 28.000 CZK/year (123,90 CZK/day)
  • Cafeteria 1000 CZK/month (MultiSport Card available)
  • Phone tariff (unlimited calls, texts messages within the EU, 20GB of Internet)
  • Employee Referral Program
  • Sabbatical leave
  • Repurchase of hardware


Moreover, we offer:

  • Above standard working equipment
  • Company mobile phone (selection from Android/iPhone)
  • Company laptop (Windows/macOS)
  • Coffee, tea, snacks and breakfasts in the office
  • Company events and team buildings
  • Gifts for work anniversaries, promotion or childbirth
  • Friendly and open culture


And last but not least, you can rely on:

  • Transparent framework for career growth, reinforced by annual performance evaluations
  • Trust and autonomy, with no micro-management
  • Learning from senior colleagues and opportunities to collaborate with professionals from various industries
  • Opportunities to attend conferences to keep skills up-to-date
  • Usage of AI tools and access to elaborate, tailored AI training

title: Robotics QA Engineer
description_html:
Are you passionate about robotics and eager to work at the forefront of software and hardware innovation? As a Robotics QA Engineer, you’ll ensure our Brightpick autonomous mobile robots reach peak reliability and performance. You will work directly with autonomous mobile robots in real-world environments, experiencing QA that goes beyond traditional software testing. From integrating and deploying new features to verifying performance in live environments, you’ll witness your impact first-hand.

If you’re ready to tackle exciting challenges, grow your expertise in robotics QA, and join a team that’s shaping the industry, this is the role for you. Join us to help create, test, and refine intelligent robotic solutions that drive the future of automation!


Location

Bratislava


Type of employment

Full-time



Core responsibilities:

  • Uncover hidden challenges: Be the detective that identifies even the most hidden glitches in our robotic systems.
  • Guarantee reliability: Evaluate new software features and verify that our robots deliver an efficient user experience.
  • Define and execute tests: Create comprehensive test scenarios for robotic platforms, ensuring new software versions meet our strict quality standards.
  • Maintain test procedures: Keep testing protocols up-to-date as product features evolve and SW/HW is upgraded.
  • Collaborate and report: Work closely with development teams to track, analyze, and resolve issues using bug-tracking tools.
  • Conduct manual & automated tests: Evaluate software in simulations, a real controlled environment, and potentially on-site.
  • Support deployment: Assist with on-site integration of new features and system roll-outs.
  • Document and replicate: Generate clear bug reports and replication scenarios so developers can swiftly address issues.
  • Assess new features: Analyze the system-wide impact of each release to guarantee overall stability and performance.
  • Stay connected: Communicate progress and insights with the QA, development, and project management teams to ensure smooth project delivery.
  • Stay ahead of the curve: Continuously expand your knowledge of our evolving robotics systems, making sure you’re always prepared to dive into our latest innovations.
  • (Optionally) Automate testing: Implement testing scripts using Python, C++, or testing frameworks to streamline quality checks.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field (Robotics, Engineering, Computer Science, etc.).
  • English proficiency: Upper-intermediate level (B2) or higher, fluent Slovak
  • A strong interest in autonomous systems, with a willingness to learn how hardware and software interact.
  • Basic Linux skills and a solid understanding of software testing principles.
  • Analytically driven, with a keen eye for detail and strong problem-solving abilities.


Nice to have:

  • Experience in robotics, mechatronics, or hardware integration
  • Python, C++, Docker, Linux, Testing libraries (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Google Tests), Familiarity with UX/UI.
  • Version control (Git) proficiency.


Benefits:

  • Daily breakfast in the office
  • Option of working from home/hybrid work (in case the position allows it)
  • Flexible work schedule (in case the position allows it)
  • Sick days
  • Parking for everyone, bike storage with showers and changing rooms on site at our HQ
  • Rooftop terrace with nice view of Bratislava
  • Dog friendly office
  • Multisport Card
  • Referral program


Additional benefits you can choose from after 1st year:

  • Multisport Card (with company contribution)
  • Contribution to a recreation stay
  • Year-round healthcare access at ProCare
  • Supplementary pension contribution (III pilier)
  • Brain boost - budget for professional development
  • Annual public transportation pass
  • E-Shop voucher to buy anything you might need

Job Description

What can you expect from this position?

Are you passionate about IT consulting and eager to kick-start your career in the field? If so, the ITSM Consultant role may be the perfect opportunity for you. As a Consultant, you'll have the chance to learn and grow alongside experienced professionals, developing your skills and becoming a key asset to our team.

As a ITSM Consultant, your primary responsibilities will include:

  • Implementing ServiceNow solutions, gaining hands-on experience with the platform.
  • Close cooperation with clients to understand their business processes, identify areas for improvement, and develop a roadmap for their ServiceNow implementation.
  • Technical Development including custom scripts, development of new applications and creation of custom user interfaces.

title: Automated Tester
description_html:
Job Description

We’ve started our journey to create a world class payments service. As the Automation Engineer, you will need the ability to understand customer needs, partner with developers, analysts, and tech leads across the delivery team to identify test scenarios and propose appropriate technical solutions. Ensure that all of the software used on global merchant acquiring platform is operating according to the relevant specification. Develop Automation, perform System testing and drive quality assurance of code and configuration. Document test activities, log defects and ensure that re-testing takes place to confirm that problems encountered have been resolved. Work in accordance with testing standards developed in-house and contribute to the continuous improvement of testing standards and automation.

Your future duties and responsibilities

What you will do:

  • Play a central role in adding to our extensive automation capabilities in testing our core acquiring platform,
  • Working with business analysts & developers to write test cases for new changes,
  • Develop and agree test plans with BAs and Software Development engineers,
  • Review Requirements, specifications and technical design documents to provide timely and meaningful feedback,
  • Log bugs, reporting the issue to the developers and taking full ownership and accountability following up to ensure that corrective action is taken,
  • Gain knowledge of the merchant acquiring business and a competence with our Merchant Acquiring platform to enable the support of other groups within the organization.

Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role

  • Maintain and develop our automated tests for both the UI and API layers.
  • Experience with Java or similar tests in C#
  • Ability to analyse a given functionality and design test cases that would be worth scripting
  • Basic knowledge of SQL to prepare test data
  • Experience with automation of elements of testing process, such as environment management, versioning, reporting, etc. is nice to have
  • Familiarity with Bash or Python would be a valuable skill
  • Experience with test automation frameworks (eg. Selenium, Cypress, REST Assured),
  • Experience of Behavioral Driven Development & Test Driven Development, knowledge of Gherkin Syntax with Cucumber a bonus,
  • Self-motivated with ability to work on own initiative or as part of a team,
  • Practical knowledge of object oriented programming principles,
  • Practical knowledge of databases and SQL (Oracle),
  • Experience with Source Code Management tools (Git),
  • At least basic knowledge about SDLC (Systems development life cycle),
  • Experience with Atlassian defect tracking tools (JIRA, XRAY),
  • Practical knowledge of CI/CD tools (Jenkins, Gitlab).
  • Fluent English, due to work in an international environment, strong English skills are also required to enable easy communication in teams distributed across the world.
  • Location: 5days a week in Bratislava office is required

What do we offer?

  • Friendly working atmosphere and a stable background of one of the largest IT companies in the world
  • Support of your professional growth
  • Certified learning programs
  • Profit Participation Plan - participation in the company’s profit
  • Share purchase Plan – the possibility of purchasing employee shares
  • 25 days of leave for regeneration for everyone
  • 3 sick-days for recovery
  • 30 days of fully paid sick leave
  • Benefit Plus Program for leisure activities
  • Referral bonus for referring a new colleague
  • Multisport card for sports and wellness facilities
  • The possibility of obtaining an interest-free loan
  • Language training
  • Vaccination against influenza and tick-borne encephalitis
  • Possibility of participation in various sports events – e.g. Do práce na bicykli/To work by bike, marathons, etc.
  • Member Assistance Program - possibility of using the advisory services of psychological and legal experts for health, work, or other serious life events
  • And many more…

Join us and find out!

The base salary starts from 1300 to 2200 EUR/m. (gross). Final salary could be higher - it depends on skills and expertise of candidates.

Spoločne ako vlastníci prenášame odborné znalosti do praxe.

Život v spoločnosti CGI je založený na vlastníctve, tímovej práci, rešpekte a pocite spolupatričnosti. Tu môžete naplno rozvinúť svoj potenciál.

Pozývame vás, aby ste sa od prvého dňa stali vlastníkmi. Spoločne pracujeme na tom, aby sme náš sen premenili na skutočnosť. Preto sa označujeme za partnerov CGI, nie za zamestnancov. Ťažíme z nášho spoločného úspechu a máme možnosť a zodpovednosť aktívne sa podieľať na smerovaní a stratégii našej spoločnosti.

Vaša práca vytvára hodnoty. Budete rozvíjať inovatívne riešenia a trvalé vzťahy s kolegami a klientmi a zároveň budete mať prístup ku globálnym možnostiam, ktoré vám pomôžu premeniť nápady na skutočnosť, využiť nové príležitosti a využívať výhody špičkových odborných znalostí a technológií v odvetví.

Budete rozvíjať svoju kariéru tým, že sa pripojíte k spoločnosti, ktorá je vybudovaná, aby rástla a pretrvala. Podporia vás vedúci pracovníci, ktorým záleží na vašom zdraví a pohode a pomôžu vám využiť príležitosti na rozvoj vašich zručností a rozšírenie obzorov.

Pridajte sa k nám, k jednej z najväčších firiem poskytujúcich poradenské služby v oblasti IT na svete.

title: Student .NET developer
description_html:
Place of work: Bratislava

Start date: Upon agreement

Basic wage component (gross) and other rewards: 7,50 EUR/hod

Contract type: Parttime

The Kistler Group is a Swiss high-tech company and the global market leader in dynamic measurement technology.

We develop and supply sensors, electronics and software backed up by a full range of services. In Bratislava we develop software for the next generation of IoT devices. Our software helps customers to manufacture higher quality products, to develop cleaner cars and to reduce congestions on the highways. Behind our success stand our passion for technology, our focus on innovation and a work environment that promotes teamwork. You can help us develop vehicles that people can trust and create measurement systems that save lives. Come shape a better future with us.

Zweck der Stelle

Development and maintenance of the the Cockpit / KiStudio application and its associated test infrastructure within the project.

Dein typischer Tag

Join our team as a Student .NET Developer and contribute to the development and maintenance of Kistler’s Cockpit / KiStudio applications. These WPF-based .NET solutions support a wide range of use cases - from automotive applications such as combustion power and E-Powertrain analysis (Cockpit) to laboratory and vehicle testing environments (KiStudio Lab).

You’ll be part of a team working on cutting-edge tools for real-time data processing, visualization, configuration, and analysis - used by engineers and researchers worldwide.

Your Responsibilities:

  • Implement new functionalities for the KiStudio / Cockpit software component according to the project scope and priorities
  • Develop and maintain automated UI and system tests using FlaUI framework
  • Participate in detailed software design and documentation in line with Kistler quality standards
  • Write unit, integration, and system tests for developed components and ensure adequate test coverage
  • Apply Kistler’s professional software development methodologies and comply with project procedures.

Dein Profil

Must have:

  • Experience with SW programming (C#, C++, Java, Python or similar) or demonstratable algorithmic thinking and problem solving
  • Motivation to learn and work within a complex .NET development and test environment
  • Ability and willingness to learn and adapt to complex development environment
  • Affinity to work in an international environment

Nice to have:

  • Knowledge of object-oriented principles, modeling tools, and design patterns
  • Structured, analytical, and systematic working style
  • Experience or interest in automated UI testing frameworks (e.g., FlaUI, PyTest, …)
  • Architecture and design creation as well as in the utilization of design patterns
  • Experience with development under Linux & Windows environment

Was Du von uns erwarten kannst

The way we work

  • Hybrid working model (based on the agreement with your team lead). We trust that you know how to organize your time to stay productive
  • Regular performance review and career growth possibilities

Health & Well-being

  • Electric stand-up desk and ergonomic chair

Recognition

  • Attractive referral bonus

Career & Development

  • Library, Online Educational Portals: Pluralsight, Safari books, LeanPub, Egghead

Social life

  • Team-buildings, Company breakfast, Christmas Party, Grill Party, Family/Kid’s day, Pizza Thursdays etc.
  • Football table and board games in the office

Extra Benefits

  • Lunch tickets in amount of 8 EUR
  • Great coffee, tea, fresh fruit

Information about the selection process Do you like it so far? Let us know, send us your CV. After receiving and reviewing your CV we will contact you for short telephone pre-screen. Following this, if successful, we will set up meeting with your future team leader and one of our technical specialist for more detailed discussion about your experience and motivation and to answer your questions about company and project itself. The final stage of the hiring process is meeting with head of Kistler Bratislava to get to know you better and align on the personal and position expectations. Our HR colleagues will be informing and guiding you through every step of this process. Good luck. We are looking forward to meeting you.

title: Internship Software Engineer
description_html:
Job Description

Are you a university student in your final 3 years of studies? Do you want to gain experience in developing software? Are you looking for an employer who supports your ideas and gives you space and tools to turn them into something useful and beautiful?

If all answers are “YES”, you are in the right place as we are looking for new team members! As an intern at Nokia, you will become a part of our research and development team (R&D) in Bratislava, Mill office building at Mlynské nivy

How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn

We are looking for our new team member with a background in Engineering and Technology / Information Technology / Telecommunications or with other university degrees from technology studies.

As part of the team you will:

  • Develop systems, tools and applications used by developers and testers using C/C++, Python, bash
  • Work on a small piece of the large system (codebase), read and understand existing code
  • Maintain existing test scripts
  • Work in Linux environment
  • Work with different versioning systems like GIT/CVS and test automation environment
  • Practice your algorithmic knowledge and develop your programming skills
  • Use your knowledge of protocols (TCP/IP) and IP Routing

Key Skills And Experience

You have:

  • At least intermediate (B2) level of English language knowledge
  • Programming languages - C/C++, Python, Bash
  • Knowledge of programming algorithms, TCP/IP protocols and IP Routing
  • Previous experience with Linux
  • Knowledge of GIT/CVS versioning systems and test automation environment

It would be nice if you also had:

  • Sharp, creative and analytical mind
  • Passion to learn new things
  • Openness to challenges

What we offer

  • Flexible working time
  • Competitive salary - gr. 7,00 EUR/hour (the final wage per hour can be increased accordingly to the individual skills and experience of the selected candidate)
  • Free refreshments & fruits in the workspace
  • Office location in Mill, building at Mlynské nivy
  • Variety of learning, project & career opportunities
  • CSR activities
  • Company events & team buildings
  • No dress code
  • Casual & innovative culture

About Us

 Come create the technology that helps the world act together

Nokia is committed to innovation and technology leadership across mobile, fixed and cloud networks. Your career here will have a positive impact on people’s lives and will help us build the capabilities needed for a more productive, sustainable, and inclusive world.

We challenge ourselves to create an inclusive way of working where we are open to new ideas, empowered to take risks and fearless to bring our authentic selves to work

What we offer

Nokia offers continuous learning opportunities, well-being programs to support you mentally and physically, opportunities to join and get supported by employee resource groups, mentoring programs and highly diverse teams with an inclusive culture where people thrive and are empowered.

Nokia is committed to inclusion and is an equal opportunity employer

Nokia has received the following recognitions for its commitment to inclusion & equality:

  • One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere
  • Gender-Equality Index by Bloomberg
  • Workplace Pride Global Benchmark

At Nokia, we act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Nokia’s employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.

We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.

Join us and be part of a company where you will feel included and empowered to succeed.

About The Team

The pandemic has highlighted how important telecoms networks are to society. Nokia’s Network Infrastructure group is at the heart of a revolution to bring more and faster network capacity to people worldwide through our ambition, innovation, and technical expertise.

title: Business Intelligence Intern
description_html:
Bloomreach is building the world’s premier agentic platform for personalization.We’re revolutionizing how businesses connect with their customers, building and deploying AI agents to personalize the entire customer journey.

  • We're taking autonomous search mainstream, making product discovery more intuitive and conversational for customers, and more profitable for businesses.
  • We’re making conversational shopping a reality, connecting every shopper with tailored guidance and product expertise — available on demand, at every touchpoint in their journey.
  • We're designing the future of autonomous marketing, taking the work out of workflows, and reclaiming the creative, strategic, and customer-first work marketers were always meant to do.


And we're building all of that on the intelligence of a single AI engine — Loomi AI — so that personalization isn't only autonomous…it's also consistent.From retail to financial services, hospitality to gaming, businesses use Bloomreach to drive higher growth and lasting loyalty. We power personalization for more than 1,400 global brands, including American Eagle, Sonepar, and Pandora.

About The Role

We are seeking a Business intelligence Intern to support the enterprise BI Team at Bloomreach. You will partner with cross-functional stakeholders—including BI, FP&A, Billing, Accounting, RevOps, and Engineering—to drive data insights and support strategic decision-making at the executive level. The starting salary is €8 per hour with the possibility to work in one of our Bloomreach offices (Bratislava/Brno/Prague) or from home on a part-time basis (20h / week).

Key Responsibilities

  • Monitor and respond to business intelligence support requests through our Slack channel, providing timely assistance to internal stakeholders on data-related queries and troubleshooting visualization issues
  • Collaborate with the BI team to design, develop, and refine Tableau dashboards and visualizations that translate complex data into actionable insights for various business units
  • Support the testing, quality assurance, and rollout of our AI chat tool by conducting user acceptance testing, documenting findings, and gathering feedback from early adopters
  • Assist in creating user documentation and training materials to facilitate smooth adoption across the organization


Qualifications

  • Technical Skills:
    • Exposure to Tableau, PowerBI, SQL or BigQuery
    • Exposure to any Business Intelligence, Analytical, or Data Visualization tool.


More things you'll like about Bloomreach:

Culture:

  • A great deal of freedom and trust. At Bloomreach we don’t clock in and out, and we have neither corporate rules nor long approval processes. This freedom goes hand in hand with responsibility. We are interested in results from day one.
  • We have defined our 5 values and the 10 underlying key behaviors that we strongly believe in. We can only succeed if everyone lives these behaviors day to day. We've embedded them in our processes like recruitment, onboarding, feedback, personal development, performance review and internal communication.
  • We believe in flexible working hours to accommodate your working style.
  • We work virtual-first with several Bloomreach Hubs available across three continents.
  • We organize company events to experience the global spirit of the company and get excited about what's ahead.
  • We encourage and support our employees to engage in volunteering activities - every Bloomreacher can take 5 paid days off to volunteer*.
  • The Bloomreach Glassdoor page elaborates on our stellar 4.4/5 rating. The Bloomreach Comparably page Culture score is even higher at 4.9/5


Personal Development:

  • We have a People Development Program -- participating in personal development workshops on various topics run by experts from inside the company. We are continuously developing & updating competency maps for select functions.
  • Our resident communication coach Ivo Večeřa is available to help navigate work-related communications & decision-making challenges.*
  • Our managers are strongly encouraged to participate in the Leader Development Program to develop in the areas we consider essential for any leader. The program includes regular comprehensive feedback, consultations with a coach and follow-up check-ins.
  • Bloomreachers utilize the $1,500 professional education budget on an annual basis to purchase education products (books, courses, certifications, etc.)*


Well-being:

  • The Employee Assistance Program -- with counselors -- is available for non-work-related challenges.*
  • Subscription to Calm - sleep and meditation app.*
  • We organize ‘DisConnect’ days where Bloomreachers globally enjoy one additional day off each quarter, allowing us to unwind together and focus on activities away from the screen with our loved ones.
  • We facilitate sports, yoga, and meditation opportunities for each other.
  • Extended parental leave up to 26 calendar weeks for Primary Caregivers.*


Compensation:

  • Restricted Stock Units or Stock Options are granted depending on a team member’s role, seniority, and location.*
  • Everyone gets to participate in the company's success through the company performance bonus.*
  • We offer an employee referral bonus of up to $3,000 paid out immediately after the new hire starts.
  • We reward & celebrate work anniversaries -- Bloomversaries!*


(*Subject to employment type. Interns are exempt from marked benefits, usually for the first 6 months.)

Excited? Join us and transform the future of commerce experiences!

If this position doesn't suit you, but you know someone who might be a great fit, share it - we will be very grateful!

Any unsolicited resumes/candidate profiles submitted through our website or to personal email accounts of employees of Bloomreach are considered property of Bloomreach and are not subject to payment of agency fees.

title: Support Engineer (SaaS/Digital) - Afternoon EMEA Hours
description_html:
Please submit your CV in English

🌍 Global SaaS Company | $28M Series B Investment

🚀 Structured mentorship & upskilling | Strong tech curiosity required

📍 Bratislava/Prague - new offices with central locations, 5 days in-office

💰 Salary: 1600-1900 EUR gross + bonus up to 400 EUR gross (or CZK equivalent)

💻 Working Hours: Mon - Fri 14:00-22:30 or Mon - Fri 15:30-00:00


What's In It For You

🤖 Product: Be part of building the world's #1 AI business calling platform!

💡 Technical Challenges: Get to learn about challenging technical problems with AI

🚀 Growth: This can be your ticket into the world of AI SaaS, advancing to:

  • Support: Shift Lead, QA Lead
  • Product: L2 Engineer, Technical Consultant, Integration Specialist
  • Customer Success: Customer Success Manager


The Challenge Ahead

As a key player in our Customer Support L1 team, you'll be the hero customers need to provide swift and insightful resolutions for questions about CloudTalk's cutting-edge AI platform. Every AI system breaks somewhere. At CloudTalk, we're building a team of geeks that love finding where and why. If you've ever fixed a bug at 2am just because it was bugging you, we'd love to have you. No worries if you're new to the field; we'll give you all the tools and support you need to succeed. This team is a training ground for future AI technical specialists.

  • Uncover the root cause of anomalies, use AI copilots to propose fixes, and make our systems smarter. You'll troubleshoot real-time voice systems that combine AI, telephony, and SaaS infrastructure.
  • Documenting knowledge, helping build a team of AI technical experts.
  • Provide top-tier technical support via chat and email to customers.
  • Use internal AI copilots to speed up troubleshooting and suggest fixes.
  • Analyze call flows, inspect logs, and debug real-time VoIP issues.
  • Manage a high volume of conversations, including live chats.
  • Represent CloudTalk by resolving issues with empathy and efficiency.


Ideal Candidate Profile

At CloudTalk, we value a growth mindset and a passion for learning & improvement. We're seeking curious individuals who measure progress not by the number of responses but by the problems understood & resolved. You should have technical acumen and a genuine interest in technical problems, especially if you're excited to break things down and understand how they work.

You're curious about how AI changes customer experience and excited to explore its role in debugging and support. If you're a collaborator that loves sharing ideas, and continuously improving, you'll fit right in! At CloudTalk, curiosity isn't optional: it's our debugging tool. We celebrate teammates who ask hard questions, and minds that can't stop wondering why something broke.

  • Tech Savvy: You chase down edge cases, you're curious about how systems break.
  • Growth Mindset: You're eager to continuously grow your skills and knowledge.
  • Self-Starter: You take ownership of your tasks, you work with minimal supervision.
  • Languages: English fluent; Spanish is a plus


About CloudTalk

Powered by a 2024 $28 million Series B investment from top investors like KPN Ventures, Lead Ventures, Point 9, and HenQ, CloudTalk's AI-powered business communication platform helps 4,000+ sales and support teams make customer experience the greatest competitive advantage for driving more revenue.

CloudTalk works seamlessly for businesses of all sizes, from scale-ups like Deel and TIER to big players like Nokia, Glovo, and Rakuten. Modern businesses all around the world can lead meaningful conversations while managing calls and messages from one place.

CloudTalk is on a mission to build the world's most capable AI business calling software for sales and support teams to seamlessly connect with their customers. We nurture a strong learning & growth culture - more than 20% of CloudTalkers get promoted/transferred internally every year!

title: Risk Management Consultant
description_html:
About The Risk Management Team

Our Risk Management & Modelling team helps our clients in the areas of credit, operational and market risks as well as related governance. We help our clients in the methodological areas, underwriting, regulatory practices, ESG and development of risk tools and models. The team is composed of skilled professionals with economics, banking and mathematical backgrounds and diverse experience. Our clients include mid-sized and large financial institutions and banks across the globe (ranging from the USA to Mongolia); you will thus be able to truly broaden your horizons.


We are looking to add one member to our team, either a fresh graduate (see junior consultant below) or a more experienced hire (see consultant below). In both cases, we are looking for a person with strong soft skills and analytical mind. A quantitative background is a plus but not a must.


Job Description & Summary

  • In the role of junior consultant, you will learn as you go, helping us during the preparation of proposals to our prospective clients, designing solutions and approaches as well as work on actual engagements
  • In the role of consultant, you will be, in tandem with a manager, responsible for job deliveries. You will help our junior colleagues, design solutions, apply regulation and come up with novel approaches to risk management in wide area of risk management topics based on the client needs. Your responsibility will be to actively engage in client discussions and be able to get quickly oriented in new areas and be able to see the problems from eyes of our clients.
  • You will be able to travel and visit new places and cultures, but not be forced to
  • You will work on diverse projects where we support our clients mainly in the areas of Risk regulation (Basel IV, CRR III/CRD 6), Risk Culture, Risk Appetite Frameworks, implementation of the 3 Lines of Defense model, Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Book, Loan monitoring approvals (Corporate, SME and Retail), ESG, Capital management (Optimization, Stress-testing, Internal capital adequacy processes, capital allocation), Risk based pricing, Recovery & Resolution (BRRD), Data management (Quality and consistency reviews), Asset quality reviews (AQRs), and Operational risk and Liquidity risk.
  • You will work alongside our senior staff and be able to learn from the best on the market.


Requirements of the role

  • Educational background in banking, finance, economics, econometrics or statistics
  • For junior consultant: From a fresh graduate to up to 2 years of experience with financial risk management (in one or more topics above)
  • For consultant: At least 2 years of experience with risk management in banking (in one or more topics above).
  • Data forms the backbone of Risk management. You should be comfortable to work with data and prepare them for your analyses to help you get insights into problems and to find supportive arguments for your views. We appreciate knowledge of at least one common language for statistical computations (VBA, SQL, R, SAS, Python, Julia...), but it is not a must (although you must be willing to learn basis of at least one of such languages)
  • Ability to actively and independently search for and propose solutions to risk management problems and make and formulate independent judgement on problems
  • You feel comfortable to stand along us in front of clients
  • High sense of accountability, ownership and responsibility for your outputs and your work
  • You must be able to learn quickly, adapt to new challenges and not back down from complex and difficult problems.
  • Comfortable using English as a main working language (German language knowledge would be a great benefit to our team; Czech language is an advantage but not required).


Our Benefits and Fun

  • Concentrated experience and rapid career growth. It may sound like a platitude, but it really is.
  • Fair salary plus paid overtime and flexible working hours.
  • Paid time off 25 days, 3 wellbeing days and 2 extra days off from the company at the end of the year.
  • High-end Ultrabook and iPhone with unlimited data.
  • Benefit program with 30.000 points that you can use for holidays, education, food vouchers, sports (Multisport), health... Simply on what you enjoy.
  • Supporting your development and education: business and digital skills training (e.g. Alteryx, Power BI, Tableau), ongoing training and certifications, e.g. Microsoft (Azure, PowerApps), project management (Prince2, PMI), service management (ITIL), agile development (Scrum, SAFe), DAMA, Salesforce, coaching and presentation skills and more. And various training within our technology communities.
  • Opportunity to work in the future at a foreign PwC office, for example in the USA, Canada and there are others in the selection.
  • Extra-work activities and Away Days (team building, ski weekend, etc.).
  • Regular feedback on your work, also consultation with a coach with whom you can address your further development and career direction.


PwC is the largest audit team in the Czech Republic, but also law, tax, consulting and technology, data or forensic teams. Find out how easy it is to combine this knowledge when you're in the right place. With us, you will get the opportunity to see how business is done in large companies. We are part of an international network of companies with more than 364,000 colleagues in 151 countries. At PwC, we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can be themselves and find their place and opportunity to develop. This year, we have successfully maintained the prestigious Equal Pay Certification, making us one of only four companies in the Czech Republic (and the only one from the Big 4) that demonstrably implements fair compensation practices regardless of gender.


Are you interested in our offer? Let us know about yourself and we will discuss more details together!

title: Junior OT Security Specialist Intern
description_html:
Job Description

Sandoz continues to go through an exciting and transformative period as a global leader and pioneering provider of sustainable Biosimilar and Generic medicines. As we continue down this new and ambitious path, unique opportunities will present themselves, both professionally and personally. Join us, the future is ours to shape!

We are looking for a motivated student who would like to join our Technology team and would be able to work around 20 hours per week!

Your Key Responsibilities

  • Support senior architects in assessing the security posture of OT environments across manufacturing and production sites
  • Assist in documenting OT system architecture, network segmentation, and asset inventories
  • Help evaluate risks and vulnerabilities within OT networks and propose basic mitigation strategies
  • Participate in projects aimed at improving visibility, monitoring, and control of OT infrastructure
  • Assist in aligning OT security controls with industry frameworks and internal policies
  • Research and document OT cybersecurity best practices, trends, and threat intelligence

What You’ll Bring To The Role

  • Current enrollment in a Master’s, or PhD program in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Industrial Automation, or a related technical field
  • Interest in cybersecurity and securing critical infrastructure or industrial systems
  • Basic understanding of network security concepts, protocols, and architectures
  • Willingness to learn about OT-specific technologies (e.g., PLCs, SCADA, DCS) and protocols
  • Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and willingness to research new topics
  • Effective communication skills in written and spoken English
  • Ability to collaborate with diverse teams and adapt to dynamic environments

Preferred Requirements

  • Familiarity with OT/ICS security frameworks such as NIST 800-82, IEC 62443, or ISA standards is a plus
  • Exposure to cybersecurity tools or platforms (e.g., asset discovery, network monitoring, intrusion detection)
  • Hands-on experience through academic projects, labs, or previous internships is a plus
  • Basic knowledge of scripting or automation (e.g., Python, PowerShell) is a bonus

What We Offer

  • A unique opportunity to gain exposure to cybersecurity in OT and industrial environments
  • Mentorship from experienced OT and cybersecurity professionals
  • Participation in global security initiatives across manufacturing and infrastructure
  • Hands-on learning in an area of growing importance in cybersecurity
  • A collaborative, supportive, and international work environment
  • Potential for future roles or thesis opportunities in OT/ICS security

Why Sandoz?

Generic and Biosimilar medicines are the backbone of the global medicines industry. Sandoz, a leader in this sector, provided more than 900 million patient treatments across 100+ countries in 2024 and while we are proud of this achievement, we have an ambition to do more!

With investments in new development capabilities, production sites, new acquisitions, and partnerships, we have the opportunity to shape the future of Sandoz and help more patients gain access to low-cost, high-quality medicines, sustainably.

Our momentum is powered by an open, collaborative culture driven by our talented and ambitious colleagues, who, in return for applying their skills experience an agile and collegiate environment with impactful, flexible-hybrid careers, where diversity is welcomed and where personal growth is supported!

Join us!

Commitment To Diversity & Inclusion

We are committed to building an outstanding, inclusive work environment and diverse teams representative of the patients and communities we serve.

#Sandoz

title: DevSecOps/Software Engineer - Automatizace, Kubernetes, Go a Rust
description_html:
Do našeho DevSecOps týmu hledáme novou posilu, která bude mít klíčovou roli v rozvoji i udržování stability projektů u jednoho z našich dlouhodobých zákazníků.
Nemusíš být expert na všechno – hledáme především někoho, kdo má dobrý technický základ, dokáže převzít odpovědnost, přemýšlí v souvislostech a může naskočit už během listopadu / nepozději na začátku prosince.

Pokud tě láká prostředí, kde se učíš praxí – na reálných projektech pro české i zahraniční zákazníky – čti dál!

Mimo projekt samotný se můžeš těšit i na spolupráci se zkušeným kolegou Pavlem Stejskalem.

Čemu se budeš věnovat:

  • Vývoji a údržbě automatizačních procesů v rámci Azure DevOps Pipelines
  • Správě dokumentace základních procesů mezi Adastrou a zákazníkem (onboarding, role, povinnosti …)
  • Aktivní identifikaci slabých míst v rámci DevSecOps aktivit u projektů
  • Řešení problémů na CI/CD a aplikační infrastruktuře (Azure Pipelines, Azure AKS)
  • Práci s ticketovacím systémem zákazníka a delegování problémů na odpovědné týmy s adekvátním popisem problému
  • Budeš spolupracovat s vývojáři, architekty a projekťáky napříč projekty

Budeme si rozumět, pokud:

  • Máš zkušenosti s Azure Cloud a Azure DevOps
  • Umíš pracovat s Git a chápeš principy CI/CD
  • Zvládneš číst i psát v YAML a Pythonu (alespoň na nějaké úrovni)
  • Dokážeš si organizovat práci a prioritizovat úkoly
  • Máš smysl pro detail, přemýšlíš kriticky a dokážeš chápat procesy (skutečné i popsané v dokumentaci)
  • Jsi komunikativní a zvládneš se domluvit v ANJ

Výhodu budeš mít, pokud:

  • Máš zkušenost s Terraform nebo Ansible (++)
  • Už jsi pracoval s nějakým ticketovacím systémem (např. Jira, ServiceNow)

Proč věříme, že ti v Adastře bude dobře:

  • Jsme stabilní mezinárodní firma s multiprojektovým prostředím, která pořád roste
  • Pod jednou střechou sdružujeme špičkové technologie a zkušené experty ze všech možných IT odvětví
  • Jednáme spolu na rovinu a ceníme si proaktivního přístupu
  • Sídlíme v krásných kancelářích Mississippi House v Karlíně

Mimo to se můžeš těšit na:

  • Neformální atmosféru – po práci se potkáváme na společenských i sportovních akcích (a těch není zrovna málo)
  • 25 dnů volna do začátku a každý rok ti k nim přidáme jeden den volna navíc
  • Flexibilní pracovní dobu i home office – vše podle domluvy
  • Lekce angličtiny, pokud se v ní potřebuješ zlepšit
  • Široké možnosti vzdělávání – tréninky, přednášky, webináře i certifikace
  • Měsíční příspěvek do Cafeterie, který můžeš využít na různé volnočasové aktivity nebo na Multisport kartu
  • Příspěvek na stravování
  • V kuchyňkách najdeš výbornou kávu, velký výběr čajů i jiné nápoje + ovocné a svačinové bedýnky plné dobrot
  • Slevy u našich partnerů – ať už jde o elektroniku, kulturu či služby
  • Dny FIT Adastra, protože nám záleží na tvém zdraví – můžeš využít odborná vyšetření, konzultace a různé aktivity pro podporu fyzické i psychické kondice
  • Rádi podporujeme, když chceš pomáhat, takže dostaneš 1 den placeného volna navíc na dobrovolnické aktivity dle svého výběru
  • Placené volno navíc, pokud doprovázíš svého prvňáčka v první školní den
  • Chceš procestovat svět, napsat knihu nebo si jen dát pauzu? Po 3 letech u nás si můžeš vzít Sabbatical leave
  • Štědrý referral program, pokud nám pomůžeš najít nové Adastřany

title: Development and Test Engineer Automotive
description_html:
Jsme nová pražská pobočka německé společnosti EVOMOTIV. V Německu se těšíme skvělé pověsti u zákazníků i zaměstnanců díky svým výborným výsledkům a otevřené firemní kultuře. Tento trend jsme vloni přenesli i do ČR a v naší pražské kanceláři jsme začali realizovat projekty s vysokou přidanou hodnotou. Inovujeme, do tradičních systémů vnášíme nové technologie a postupy. AI pro nás není buzzword, ale aktivně ji implementujeme do našich projektů. Právě teď máš příležitost stát se součástí stále ještě nového týmu EVOMOTIV a otisknout se tak navždy do jejího dalšího směřování. Hledáme vývojové a testovací inženýry, kteří mají drive a chuť budovat kvalitní značku. Na českém trhu s německým parťákem v zádech.

CO BUDE NÁPLNÍ TVÉ PRÁCE?

  • Budeš vyvíjet a integrovat nejen automobilové mechatronické systémy, jako je ADAS, podvozky a elektrické řídící systémy. Máš příležitost tak přímo ovlivnit posun celého odvětví na další úroveň.
  • Budeš hledat nová, chytrá řešení a ověřovat jejich funkčnost a spolehlivost v systémech aut.
  • Pracovat budeš na projektech předních evropských automobilek - Tvé nápady se zhmotní v nových vozech.
  • Také budeš komunikovat s týmy zákazníků i s kolegy v Německu - v mezinárodním prostředí tak za chvíli budeš jako doma.
  • V blízké době se můžeš podílet i na testování aut v testovacích centrech v jiných zemích Evropy - občasné cestování tak bude součástí Tvé práce.

CO OD TEBE OČEKÁVÁME?

  • Jsi nadšenec a práce s nejnovějšími automotive mechatronickými systémy je Tvojí vášní.
  • Úspěšně jsi dokončil inženýrský stupeň studia některého z technických oborů (automotive, mechatronika, elektro- nebo strojní inženýrství, IT a další), nebo jsi středoškolák s pár lety praxe.
  • Mluvíš plynule česky a anglicky. Máš navíc znalost němčiny? Ideální!

NA CO SE U NÁS MŮŽEŠ TĚŠIT

Naše EVOMOTIV firemní kultura Ti umožní ideálně skloubit práci a volný čas:

  • s pružnou pracovní dobou si práci naplánuješ, jak potřebuješ - stačí se domluvit s týmem
  • home-office nebo práci na dálku budeš moci kombinovat dle svých potřeb a potřeb projektu
  • 5 týdnů dovolené ti zajistí dostatek času na relax dle vlastních preferencí

Chceme, aby ses i v práci cítil/-a jako doma:

  • Máme otevřenou firemní kulturu, kde si lidé váží jeden druhého.
  • Posloucháme se navzájem - tvůj názor je pro nás důležitý.
  • Pracujeme v moderním prostředí Port7 v pražských Holešovicích - máme krásné kanceláře s terasou, s metrem na jedné a cyklostezkou na druhé straně a s nabídkou kulturních akcí přímo v areálu.

Více si o naší firemní kultuře můžeš přečíst zde.

Jdeš do toho s námi? Pošli nám svůj životopis v angličtině! Těšíme se na Tebe!

#Vehicle Engineer, #Vehicle Development, #Vehicle Testing, #Automotive Testing, #Automotive Developer

title: DevOps Engineer - Junior
description_html:
Ahoj, my jsme Legito! 👋

Z Brna budujeme s vášní a odhodláním startup (nebo už ScaleUp?) s globálním dopadem, který umožňuje neprogramátorům programovat a tím výrazně mění, jak lidé ve firmách pracují. Zákazníci z celého světa jako město New York, PwC (PricewaterhouseCoopers), Deloitte, nebo Škoda Auto dokazují, že naše práce má smysl.

Jak jsme to dokázali?
Jsme opravdový startup, který není vlastněný žádnými fondy a ani za sebou nemá velký korporát. Vše jsme vybudovali od nuly až do současných osmi nul a 40 zaměstnanců díky tomu, že pro nás bylo vždy nejdůležitější vyvíjet funkce, které pomohou našim zákazníkům a uživatelům být úspěšnější díky naší aplikaci. Nepředstíráme, že udržet si rychlý růst na globálním trhu je snadné. Jsme ale soutěživí a baví nás nové výzvy, takže si tu jízdu společně parádně užíváme, i když ze sebe občas musíme dostat to nejlepší, abychom uspěli. Jsi taky takový/á? Pak se ti u nás bude rozhodně líbit! 🚀

Součástí tvé práce bude:

  • Příprava produkčních, stagingových a testovacích prostředí jak našich, tak klientů
  • Nasazování nových verzí aplikace
  • Zálohování + testování záloh a případná obnova ze záloh
  • Po zaučení držení pohotovosti (cca 10 dní za měsíc být na příjmu v dosahu PC a internetu)
  • Pokud budeš mít zájem účastnit se i našich DevOps projektů, budeme rádi

Hledáme někoho, kdo se někdy prakticky potkal s:

  • Správou OS Linux (Debian, Ubuntu)
  • Docker
  • Bash scripting
  • Git
  • Máš přehled o síťovém provozu a jeho bezpečnosti

Pokud některé technologie neovládáš dokonale, rádi tě je doučíme. 

Abys k nám dobře zapadl/zapadla, potřebuješ:

  • mít rád výzvy (zkušenosti s prací ve startupu výhodou)
  • mít chuť na sobě pracovat a neustále se zlepšovat
  • mít VŠ (obor nerozhoduje)

Čím si nás ještě můžeš získat:

  • Jsi týmový hráč - máš chuť být součástí naší party
  • Rychle se učíš a přizpůsobuješ novým situacím
  • Hledáš inovativní, zkrácené cesty k řešení problémů
  • Umíš si rozvrhnout práci tak, abys mohl/a flexibilně reagovat na potřeby týmu
  • Dokážeš být agilní a přizpůsobit se novým výzvám v dynamicky se rozvíjejícím týmu a produktu
  • Preferujeme týmovou spolupráci na místě, máme možnost omezeného home office

Ty můžeš očekávat od nás:

  • Nástup ihned
  • Odměnu po zaučení 40 000 - 50 000 Kč na IČO

Dále také:

  • 4 týdny dovolené i pro osvč
  • Možnost stát se součástí party lidí, ve které každý člověk bere Legito za vlastní, záleží mu na něm a společně s námi prožívat úspěchy i neúspěchy
  • Příležitost se rozvíjet v týmu talentovaných, zkušených a motivovaných kolegů
  • Práci v příjemném a moderním prostředí vlastních kanceláří v novém komplexu Vlněna
  • Možnost Multisport karty, masáží za zvýhodněnou cenu a dalších firemních výhod
  • Účast na zajímavých interních i externích meetupech
  • Je pro nás důležité budování dobrého týmu, pořádáme proto každý měsíc různé firemní akce (snídaně, grilovačky, filmové večery, lan párty, deskovky..

Jak probíhá výběrové řízení:

Pokud se nám zalíbí tvé CV, osobně se potkáme u nás v Legitu. Pokud si oboustranně sedneme, dostaneš úkol na doma, na kterém si vyzkoušíš, co bys tady dělal/a a případně se na něm rovnou něco naučíš. Pokud se nám výsledek bude líbit, plácneme si. V opačném případě dostaneš feedback na to, co můžeš zlepšit.

⬆️Slavnostní "přestřižení pásky" k otevření druhé poloviny patra. Více najdeš na našem Linkedinu.

O nás:

Legito založili v roce 2014 spolužáci z Fakulty informatiky. V současné době máme stovky tisíc uživatelů a působíme téměř po celém světe (platící klienti ve více než 40 zemích). Mezi naše největší klienty patří PwC (přes 120 000 uživatelů celosvětově), Societe Generale Group (Komerční banka a spol.), Grant Thornton, Unicredit,  Deloitte Legal, Škoda Auto, Lexis Nexis, největší advokátní kanceláře a mnoho dalších. Náš příběh tím rozhodně nekončí, naopak nabírá na intenzitě a budeme rádi, když ho budeš sdílet s námi.

Celkem má náš tým kolem 40 členů . Hlavní epicentrum veškerého dění je v Brně, ale máme také několik kolegů v zahraničí: Velká Británie, USA a Kolumbie. 

O cestě Legita si můžeš také přečíst na webu:

  • CzechCrunch: Spojila právo s IT a přidala správu firemních procesů. Mladá firma z Brna si tím získala globální hráče
  • CTP blog: Legito věří v blízkou spolupráci mezi lidmi. Na automatizaci dokumentů vyrostlo 12násobně
  • Hospodářské noviny: PwC a Legito nově společně nabízejí platformu pro automatizaci dokumentů
  • Finmag: Nebudu to dělat! Startup z Brna vyrostl na odporu k rutině, obraty má snové

Tady se můžeš podívat na krátké shrnutí našeho produktu:

Jak bude vypadat tvůj běžný den mezi námi?

I přes to, jak je náš startupový svět hektický a že každý den nemusí být stejný, si však zakládáme na tom, že máme neformální a přátelskou atmosféru. Například tě po příchodu může přivítat několik čtyřnohých hapiness managerů: 

Zaujala tě naše nabídka?

Napiš nám něco o sobě v průvodním dopise a přilož CV. Rádi tě následně pozveme k nám na čaj či kávu a popovídáme si.

title: Backend Engineer for Web Automation team (Node.js)
description_html:
Apify's mission is to make the web more programmable. Why? Because we believe that humans have better things to do than fill information into internet forms, compile Excel sheets of copy-pasted data, or watch thousands of videos to determine whether they include a specific brand logo. Those are jobs for a machine. And just as in the real world we have tools that make our lives easier, we should have tools to make our lives easier on the web.

Web automation can be anything. We robotize unsubscribe flows to save people money and we collect billions of rows of data from all over the world for science, market research, or finding lost children. Fortune 500 companies and small startups alike need this power to make great business decisions.

To support our mission, we're looking for talented and experienced engineers to help us build the next generation of the web, where machines talk to machines and humans do creative work that drives progress. Will you join us ?

Please be aware that we are currently looking only for full-time candidates living in the Czech Republic!

Who are we looking for?

  • You have a good knowledge of JavaScript & TypeScript (Node.js) and Web technologies
  • You are an avid learner and looking to grow your expertise in the web scraping domain and in general
  • You have a problem-solving mindset
  • You're able to write and speak English well
  • You have empathy and patience to understand customers and their needs
  • At minimum 1 year of programming experience (school and self-learning counts)
  • Currently, we are only looking for a full-time commitment
  • You live in the Czech Republic and are able to come to our Prague office at least once a month
  • Even better if you:
    • Have contributed to a non-trivial user-facing product
    • Have experience fine-tuning products for UX/DX
    • Like to write and share experience - tutorials, technical support, tooling, etc.

What you will learn with us?

  • How websites work behind the curtain
  • How to write beautiful code that reads like a novel
  • How to write efficient cloud programs that process hundreds of millions of pages monthly
  • How to contribute to collaborative open and closed source projects and design great APIs that other devs will love to use
  • And potentially, how to build your own team and start your own projects inside the company

Our tech stack:

  • Development: Node.js (with Typescript), Chrome Dev Tools, Crawlee, Apify SDK, Puppeteer, Playwright, JQuery/Cheerio + many other specialized libraries. We also released Python SDK lately and are acquiring expertise in Python scraping tools.
  • Environment: Local IDE for development & testing. Then deploy to the Apify Platform via GitHub for production
  • Tools: GitHub, ZenHub, Notion, GSuite, GitHub Copilot license
  • Process: in-depth onboarding, code reviews, tests, automating whatever we can, using common sense over strict processes

Why should you work for Apify?

  • Full-time position in Prague at our amazing office located in Lucerna Palace, Prague, Czech Republic 🏰
  • Option to work remotely 🛋️
  • Flexible working hours (perfect for both night owls 🦉 and early birds 🐥)
  • Zero bullshit policy – No Jira, no Okta, no Confluence, no Certified™ScrumMasters®, no quarterly estimates. Just GitHub, GSuite, Notion, Slack, and shipping stuff to production
  • Nobody counts holidays as long as the work gets done 💪
  • Stock options and profit sharing 💰
  • We welcome pets, kids, and bikes at the office 🐕👨‍👧🚲
  • Epic team buildings and offsites 🚢 with biking, canoeing, and other adventures 🪂
  • Solid education and training budget, conference tickets, internal “Eat & Learn” sessions, and the possibility to work across teams 👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻
  • Generous hardware budget 💻
  • Free lunches every day 🌮🍱🍜🍕🥡
  • Unlimited supply of ☕ & 🍺 and snacks
  • Free entry to the wonderful Prague Zoo 🐘
  • Ping-pong, chess, PS5, lightsabers, foosball league after lunch, free Multisport card, and so on

title: Fullstack .NET Developer
description_html:
Hledáme nadšence pro vývoj webových aplikací!

Chceš se podílet na vývoji moderních webových a backendových aplikací? Připoj se k nám a pracuj s technologií jako  .NET, . NET Core, Node.js. Jsme otevření juniorům i čerstvým absolventům – důležitá je chuť učit se a zájem o technologie.

O čem je tato pozice:

  • Vývoj a údržba webových a backendových aplikací.
  • Spolupráce s týmem na návrhu a implementaci nových funkcí.
  • Participace na analýze a návrhu softwarových řešení.
  • Testování a debugging aplikací.
  • Podíl na optimalizaci výkonu aplikací.

Požadujeme (nebo spíš oceníme):

  • Základní znalost HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
  • Kladný vztah k matematice a algebře.
  • Zkušenosti s frameworky jako React / Next.js, ASP.NET MVC.
  • Porozumění pojmům jako responzivní web, SEO, přístupnost.
  • Orientace v IT: HTTP, certifikáty, request-response model.
  • Znalost backend technologií: Node.js, .NET, .NET Core.
  • Zkušenosti s API, mikroservisy.
  • Základy práce s databázemi: MSSQL, MySQL, Oracle.
  • Mnohem důležitější je ovšem skutečný zájem a nadšení pro technologie a jejich aplikování v praxi.
  • Otevřená mysl, smysl pro logické / analytické uvažování, nebát se přemýšlet mimo krabičku, zájem chápat nejen co a jak tady děláme, ale i proč a pro koho to děláme. 
  • Schopnost se postavit k výzvám čelem, rozhodně se nebát chyb a možných selhání – důležité! 
  • Schopnost  udržet si zdravý nadhled nad věcmi, chtít věci dotáhnout do konce. 
  • Proaktivnost a komunikativnost, týmový duch, případně zkušenost s týmovými nástroji jako GitLab, GitHub, Assana, Jira, Figma, a podobně.
  • Orientace v oblasti AI - nadšení a případně i nějaké zkušenosti nejen s používáním AI, ale i její implementací. 
  • Ochota se učit spoustu nových a zajímavých věcí, držet krok s trendy a podělit se i o vlastní zkušenosti a nápady, ochota vložit do práce „kousek sebe“. 😊 
  • Trochu té angličtiny, všeobecné i technické.


Nabízíme:

  • Kvalitní zázemí české IT firmy s téměř 30letou tradicí.
  • Příjemné pracovní prostředí v branickém pivovaru s parkováním zdarma.
  • Místo pro osobní rozvoj a účast na zajímavých projektech.
  • Podporu profesního rozvoje (školení, certifikace).
  • Množství firemních akcí a teambuildingů.
  • Možnost Home Office, stravenkovou kartu a Multisport kartu.
  • Občerstvení na pracovišti a neomezený přístup ke kávě a mnoho dalšího. 😊


Přidej se k nám a staň se součástí týmu lidí, kteří nejen že rádi spolupracují na zajímavých projektech, ale také si užívají společné chvíle mimo práci. Těšíme se na Tebe!

title: Chceš se stát engineerkou/engineerem v Red Hatu?
description_html:
Ahoj budoucí juniorky a junioři!

Prostudoval/a sis pozorně junior.guru a teď přemýšlíš o zaměstnání v IT oboru? Věnuješ se ve škole či volném čase programování? Nebo Tě jen baví vrtat se v operačním systému? Láká Tě open source?

Pokud jsi na předešlé otázky odpověděl/a ano, pak by Tě mohla zajímat práce právě v Red Hatu!

Red Hat je firma vyvíjející (nejen) infrastrukturní open source produkty, bez kterých by se neobešly mnohé globální společnosti (např. Siemens, BMW nebo největší světová burza).

Každý rok hledáme pro naše týmy juniorky a juniory, kteří mají zájem podílet se na vývoji našich produktů, jejich automatizovaném testování nebo mají zájem o práci DevOps.

Aby jsi uspěl/a u pohovoru, měl/a bys být především zvídavý/á, a aktivně se zajímat o technologie. Měl/a by ses rád/a učit nové věci a pracovat na sobě. Angličtina na komunikativní úrovni je u nás samozřejmostí, aby ses domluvil/a se svými kolegy.

Z technických znalostí většinou stačí, že dokážeš psát kód v některém z u nás používaných jazyků (většinou jde o Python, Javu, C nebo Golang, ale někdy taky Ruby, Javascript či Rust) a trošku si rozumíš s Linuxem a jeho příkazovou řádkou. Pak už stačí jen promyslet, jaký typ pozice by pro Tebe byl vhodný. Pokud by sis s čímkoliv nevěděl/a rady, naši recruiteři či recruiterky Ti rádi pomohou.

Určitě Tě zajímá, co u nás získáš…

Především se naučíš, jak funguje týmová spolupráce ve velké technologické multikulturní firmě. Čekají Tě také technická i netechnická školení a certifikace, které Ti pomůžou růst směrem, který sis vybral/a. Vzdělávání je pro nás velmi důležité! Mentoring ze strany seniornějších kolegů je samozřejmostí.

Typicky se v Red Hatu můžeš setkat s velkou volností (ale i zodpovědností) a s příležitostmi k ovlivnění větších i menších rozhodnutí uvnitř firmy. Tvůj manažer Tě podpoří ve Tvých vlastních projektech nebo třeba v účasti na konferencích.

Ojedinělým benefitem je naše unikátní kultura a pracovní prostředí, které je přímo inspirované fungováním opensourcových komunit. Ostatně, zaměstnanci Red Hatu do těchto komunit často v rámci své práce přispívají a pomáhají tak budovat lepší řešení s dobrovolníky…

Ať už to zní jako něco přesně pro Tebe, nebo si stále nejsi jistý/á, pojď to zkrátka zkusit!

Ozvi se nám, pobavíme se o tom, co umíš, podíváme se spolu na aktuálně otevřené pozice a zvážíme, která z nich by Ti mohla vyhovovat. Mrkni na naše kariérní stránky a pokud se Ti nějaká pozice líbí, neboj se nám napsat.

Těšíme se na Tebe! :)
